notes: Settings panes are now ordered to match the other Dragon apps.
A new "two ice cubes" app icon, plus added test coverage for the Layout pane.
fix: bump to 2.9.2 so update checks detect the release
chore: bump DragonKit to 1.3.0, adopt DragonAbout.versionString(), v2.9.1
fix: stop perpetual 1s permission polling that churned idle CPU; bump 2.8.8
fix: make menu bar item polling event-driven to cut idle power; bump 2.8.7
Even lower idle CPU — the Menu Bar Appearance editor now loads only when you open it, removing the last bit of background CPU measured after 2.8.5.
